about.label: Get to know me
about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: A developer passionate about creating robust and elegant solutions.
about.description1: I'm Francisco Guadarrama, a Computer Systems Engineer with over 5 years of experience in full-stack web development. My focus is on creating, maintaining, and optimizing large-scale enterprise applications.
about.description2: Specialized in modernizing legacy systems and building new robust solutions, I master both backend (Laravel, Node.js) and modern frontend (React, Angular). I'm passionate about clean code, scalability, and helping teams achieve ambitious tech goals.

experience.label: Trajectory
experience.title: Experience
experience.subtitle: Over 5 years building robust solutions for various industries.
experience.desc1: Led the modernization of legacy government systems, implementing scalable REST APIs and modern frontend architectures. Mentored junior developers and improved CI/CD pipelines.
experience.desc2: Developed enterprise solutions for consulting clients, integrating cloud services and optimizing database performance. Collaborated with cross-functional teams to deliver projects on time.
experience.desc3: Built and maintained web applications for creative agencies, focusing on UI/UX and backend reliability. Automated deployment processes and enhanced system security.

projects.label: Portfolio
projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Government and business impact solutions developed with best practices.

project1.title: Government Data Platform
project1.description: A scalable platform for managing and visualizing government data, featuring real-time analytics and secure access controls.

project2.title: Enterprise Resource Planner
project2.description: ERP system for business process automation, integrating inventory, HR, and finance modules with modern UI.
